cards.title: Connect Google Calendar
cards.description: Connect your calendar once - takes about 60 seconds. Your Minion will have access to your real schedule.

steps.description: Click Customize ChatGPT in the left sidebar of ChatGPT.
Click Add Connectors, then Browse Connectors.
Find Google Calendar, click Connect, and give the required permissions. Use the same Google account you are logged into ChatGPT with.

cards.title: See What Your Minion Knows
cards.description: Run both prompts in a new chat. Your Minion is now reading your actual calendar.

prompts.label: Check Schedule
prompts.description: Ask your Minion what your schedule looks like tomorrow.

prompts.label: Find a Free Slot
prompts.description: Ask your Minion to find a 3-hour block in the next 2 weeks.

cards.title: Book the Heist Meeting
cards.description: Fill in the placeholders then give your Minion one goal. They will find the slot, create the invite, and send it.
